evidence.snippet: Lightweight fuel & liquid containment solutions for UAV/UAS/Drones.

Lightweight Fuel & Liquid Containment for Unmanned/Uncrewed Systems
Lightweight Fuel & Liquid Containment for Unmanned/Uncrewed Systems

items.notes: ATL makes lightweight fuel bladders (fuel storage/containment) for UAV/UAS/drone platforms — the fuel storage component of the propulsion/power chain.
Custom-engineered precision containment vessels, machined fittings, and composite containers that integrate into UAV airframes.

headquarters.notes: UK registered company (Company Reg 3490552, VAT GB 478070233). Contact page refers to Ramsey, NJ as 'USA headquarters' (the US entity) and Milton Keynes as 'UK design and manufacturing facility'; the Ltd entity is UK-based.

evidence.snippet: ATL customers include: AeroVironment, Inc. (AV), Boeing, General Atomics, General Dynamics, Griffon Aerospace, Lockheed Martin, NASA, Northrop Grumman, Raytheon, Textron Systems, Turkish Aerospace, and many more.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: ATL manufactures fuel bladders and liquid containment components integrated into UAV/UAS platforms by OEMs such as AeroVironment, Boeing, General Atomics, Northrop Grumman, etc.

evidence.snippet: ATL is increasingly recognised as a leading supplier to the Defence sector, supplying flexible bladders as well as stainless steel, aluminium and rotationally moulded plastic tanks into the international defence and security market, including being selected as the fuel system supplier to General Dynamics’ ‘Foxhound LPPV’

items.name: Defence Roto-Moulded Tanks
items.product_type: rotationally moulded polymer tanks for defence

evidence.snippet:
Roto-Moulded Tanks
High-strength polymer tanks designed for rapid delivery, from simple shapes to fully integrated fuel systems.

products.notes: UAV fuel bladders are custom/bespoke with no named SKU. Named product lines are primarily in motorsport and defence.

evidence.snippet: For decades, Aero Tec Laboratories has been at the forefront of bladder technology. The world-leader for Safety Fuel Cells in Motorsport, ATL has supplied every Formula 1 team for over 25 years and is the manufacturer of choice for all major motorsport OEMs.

readiness.notes: Established manufacturer with serial production capability; catalog SKU lines in motorsport and custom production programs for defence and UAV sectors.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance not addressed anywhere on site
Blue UAS cleared list status not mentioned
No named UAV-specific product SKUs — all drone fuel bladders are bespoke/custom programs
tagline: UK-based manufacturer of crash-resistant flexible fuel bladders and tank systems for aerospace, defence, and motorsport. Product lines include the Saver Cell, Racell, and Black Widow series for UAV/UAS applications. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Established vendor with production-ready defence-rated offerings, but public evidence of specific US unmanned-systems contracts or programs remains sparse.
